ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cycles" (
  "cycle_index" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the test cycle */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test cycle */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test cycle */,
  "test_time_seconds" REAL /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "min_current" REAL /* Minimum current recorded during the test */,
  "max_current" REAL /* Maximum current recorded during the test */,
  "min_voltage" REAL /* Minimum voltage recorded during the test */,
  "max_voltage" REAL /* Maximum voltage recorded during the test */,
  "charge_capacity" REAL /* Charge capacity in amp-hours */,
  "discharge_capacity" REAL /* Discharge capacity in amp-hours */,
  "charge_energy" REAL /* Charge energy in watt-hours */,
  "discharge_energy" REAL /* Discharge energy in watt-hours */,
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test conditions under which the cycle was conducted */,
  "test_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameters used during the test */,
  "battery_pack_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery pack being tested */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes for the test cycle */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the engineer who created the test cycle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test cycle was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cycles_battery_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_pack_id") REFERENCES battery_packs ("pack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cycles_test_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_parameter_id") REFERENCES test_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cycles_test_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_packs" (
  "pack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery pack */,
  "chemistry" TEXT /* Type of battery chemistry (e.g., Lithium-ion, Nickel-Metal Hydride) */,
  "capacity_Ah" REAL /* Nominal capacity in amp-hours */,
  "voltage_nominal_V" REAL /* Nominal voltage in volts */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the battery pack */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the battery pack */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the battery pack was manufactured */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the battery pack */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the battery pack (e.g., In Use, Under Test, Decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the testing station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of testing station (e.g., Lab, Field) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "equipment_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the testing equipment used */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the testing station */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the testing station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the testing station (e.g., Operational, Under Maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "cycle_index" INTEGER /* Reference to the test cycle conducted */,
  "pack_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery pack tested */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing station used */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., Passed, Failed, In Progress) */,
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test conditions */,
  "test_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test parameters */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes for the test result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the engineer who created the test result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("pack_id") REFERENCES battery_packs ("pack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_parameter_id") REFERENCES test_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_cycle_index FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_index") REFERENCES test_cycles ("cycle_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES testing_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engineers" (
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engineer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the engineer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the engineer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the engineer (e.g., technician, researcher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the engineer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the engineer belongs to */,
  "supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engineer's account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery test */,
  "pack_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery pack tested */,
  "cycle_index" INTEGER /* Reference to the test cycle executed */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engineer who conducted the test */,
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test conditions */,
  "test_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test parameters */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes for the test */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the engineer who created the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_tests_test_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_tests_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_tests_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("pack_id") REFERENCES battery_packs ("pack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_tests_test_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_parameter_id") REFERENCES test_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_tests_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("engineer_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_tests_cycle_index FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_index") REFERENCES test_cycles ("cycle_index")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing parameter */,
  "param_value" REAL /* Value of the testing parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the engineer who created the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test conditions (e.g., Normal, High Temp) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the engineer who created the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "cycle_index" INTEGER /* Reference to the test cycle */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "current" REAL /* Current in amperes at the timestamp */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage in volts at the timestamp */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius at the timestamp */,
  "battery_pack_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery pack */,
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test conditions */,
  "test_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test parameters */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the engineer who created the log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_test_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_test_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_parameter_id") REFERENCES test_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_battery_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_pack_id") REFERENCES battery_packs ("pack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_cycle_index FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_index") REFERENCES test_cycles ("cycle_index")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test result this report summarizes */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings from the tests */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test conditions */,
  "test_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test parameters */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes for the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the engineer who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_test_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_parameter_id") REFERENCES test_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_test_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)
